jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Vedantu - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Vedantu in Nagpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!
